products.name: The Base Stick

products.description: A trio of your bare skin essentials.

products.name: The Glow Oil
products.description: Hydrates the lips while adding a sheer splash of colour.

products.name: The Lip Mask

products.name: The Lip Set

products.name: The Shadow Stick

products.name: The Lash Lift
products.description: Your lashes - but better.
